special_mechanics.name: ladder_climbing
special_mechanics.description: Peter Pepper can climb ladders in the platform maze to move vertically between levels

special_mechanics.name: ingredient_falling
special_mechanics.description: Walking the full length of a burger ingredient causes it to fall to the level below, knocking down other ingredients or enemies

special_mechanics.name: pepper_stun
special_mechanics.description: Limited pepper shots (5 initial, refilled by collecting food items) can be thrown to briefly stun enemies in front of Peter

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/qualitative data. Sources provide gameplay mechanics and high-level design information but no precise physics parameters, sub-pixel data, or numerical movement values. BurgerTime is a platform puzzle game centered on ingredient manipulation and enemy avoidance rather than jump-centric movement mechanics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - BurgerTime (NES, Famicom Disk System)
